steps.title: Eliminate x by scaling the first equation
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by 2 to match the $x$-coefficient in the second:
$$10x + 24y = 54$$
Subtract the second equation from this result:
$$(10x + 24y) - (10x + 6y) = 54 - 18$$
$$18y = 36$$
$$y = 2$$

steps.title: Calculate the product xy
steps.content:
Multiply the two solutions:
$$xy = \frac{3}{5} \cdot 2 = \frac{6}{5}$$
Expressed as a decimal, $\frac{6}{5} = 1.2$.
The answer is 1.2,6/5.
